name: environment_municipal_bond_covenant_southport_lib_eq
premise: A Environment field incident unit is in a fast-moving incident involving environment municipal bond covenant southport lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 45 minutes. Every delay increases ecological harm, community impact, and compliance. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Darius Kaur
agents.identity: I am Darius Kaur, accountable for a defensible call in Environment when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Soren Haddad
agents.identity: I am Soren Haddad, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Environment.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 45 minutes. Evidence is partial. Darius Kaur must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Darius Kaur do?
